scripts.build: npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-client run build && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-mcp run build && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-provider run build
scripts.test: npm run build && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-client test && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-mcp test && npm --workspace @stelis/agent-q-provider test
